items.text: The PhotoMone platform and all related features, including AI-generated virtual face creation, image fusion, content generation, ranking systems, exposure systems, points, and rewards.

natureOfService.heading: 2. Nature of the Service
natureOfService.lead: The Service does not trade or distribute real user photos.
insteadItems: The Service uses Input Content to generate entirely new AI-based virtual faces
Generated Content is synthetic and does not represent real individuals
Multiple variations may be created through AI fusion, transformation, and synthesis

It is not a marketplace for real identity, likeness, or personal image rights
